$schema_note: Factual integration manifest for an external Claude coding sprint. No secrets, URLs with credentials, database passwords, service-role keys, JWT secrets, or environment-variable VALUES are included - only variable NAMES where relevant.
required_test_commands: python -m pytest -m "unit or integration or e2e or benchmark" -q
required_backward_compatibility: Legacy /api/simulate/* router, its schemas (SimulationRunRequest/Response), and BaseSolver/ThermalSolver must keep working unmodified.
Do not change PersistenceRepository abstract method signatures or existing SupabaseRepository/LocalSQLiteRepository method semantics; only add new methods.
Do not edit already-applied SQL migrations; add new migration files instead, mirrored into both database/migrations/ and backend/supabase/migrations/.
Never register a formula-only/empirical estimator with implementation_status='real'; never describe a closed-form estimator as a field solver.
New /api/simulations solver additions must follow the existing EngineeringSolver template method contract (validate -> prepare -> mesh -> solve -> convergence -> serialize).
Ownership checks (user_id match, 404 fail-closed on mismatch) must be preserved for any new persisted resource.
planned_solver_ids: cfd_wind_drag_v1 (promote from prototype to a validated reduced-order model, still not a field solver, before considering a real CFD field solver)
wave_acoustic_v0 (no implementation yet; smallest defensible step is a benchmarked 1D Helmholtz duct-resonance solver)
electromagnetic_v0 (no implementation yet; smallest defensible step is a benchmarked 1D magnetostatic solenoid solver)
coupled_multiphysics_v0 (no implementation yet; smallest defensible step is one-way thermal-to-structural coupling on the existing 1D bar)
expected_module3_capabilities: Benchmark test validating cluster_designs/build_correlation_matrix against a synthetic dataset with known ground truth (currently unvalidated).
Optional: direct integration reading persisted Module 1/2 data instead of requiring the caller to assemble design_results manually.
No new physics solving belongs in Module 3 - it remains a statistical/pattern-discovery layer only.
